current.headline: Miami Weather Warning: Thunderstorms Threaten England-Norway Kick-off
current.summary: Meteorologists warn of severe thunderstorms and lightning near the Hard Rock Stadium in Miami. FIFA regulations state any lightning within 8 miles will suspend play.

items.headline: Haaland: Kane is a beast, but Norway is ready for England
items.summary: Speaking ahead of the quarter-final, Erling Haaland paid tribute to England captain Harry Kane, calling him a world-class striker, but insisted Norway can pull off another shock.
